textByHash.e13fd172b3c9843669f49a86252ac0bfa7c45c45: Looking to market another one of his buisness ideas is he? It will cost him double this time. We still haven't cleaned up the mess made by his last great idea.
textByHash.c7e321a5bc8e9113c2e558759939aec5f868a3df: Emelio having ideas, or said ideas not being very good? Yes to both, I suppose.
textByHash.8414d8350a87b65d2a4b8e8ca8ffce45009cdc6d: Hmm... I must admit, I'm somewhat impressed. Emelio might finally be on to something here.
textByHash.4c3b0747b4cdacad163df877c66ab599bc82224b: Yes, and it's your lucky day. We have an advertising spot open before the next contest. The last promoter had to pull out suddenly.
textByHash.f55a911e199dbbf3b8f6e49890a5e073323bfe27: Nice and simple really. Before the contest starts, we run a couple of adverts for local businesses. You get a few minutes to promote your product however you feel suitable.
textByHash.405e5053de81383dacac0523b251414b78fd9049: In some cases we allow promoters to make use of some of the Colosseum creatures as part of their advert, provided I deem it suitable.
textByHash.7ac30f486cf0033644b99529c5b9f111873eefa9: Well I suppose they did impress me, and we do have a young minotaur spare from that promoter who had to pull out. Very well, you can make use of him.
textByHash.fbaacdef0c0a87940bf2c653f1a0c32e8ceb8078: You want to convince people to buy these kebabs, right? I'd suggest you head on in, take a bite out of one and then give the minotaur a good kick.
textByHash.824ab315bb640ed0e989da4225960194f54ea19f: He'll pretend to go down in one. The audience will love it.
textByHash.dda2b17371beee2eeca863eff8b2dd47cac5dcf6: If the crowd is happy, he'll be happy. Now, are you ready?
textByHash.d961434acf83c4908725c0b88a49141f9e95aafa: Yup. Next contest starts soon and we don't have another slot for weeks.
textByHash.93238405dc3910d47ea1564802f1955089b00129: Are you ready? Your advertising slot is coming up and I don't intend to delay the contest for you.
textByHash.8a35db5ec1b857ce4c452dec98bf6cf0f73da389: Yes, he doesn't seem too happy about those kebabs. I'll speak to the beastmaster about it. In the meantime, you'd better get in there and deal with him.
textByHash.4c9084f7e480bf60d673bfa2ef542adfb2e9e5a1: Because if you don't, no one will want to buy those kebabs of yours.
textByHash.1fe216e9df53e4404876e0f07262b195ad1e6a9d: You put on a good performance in there. The crowd seemed very impressed.
textByHash.7f54a4fa99f422307f300eee3ceabba184a18d16: What about it? It got out of control and you killed it. Saves the beastmaster a job.
textByHash.b1ccf619cebf900a8919a276d0a37e8691ae7bf5: You survived, didn't you? I don't see the problem.
textByHash.d60a1cf63a11c8699c6368b4150367e7c2c30f4d: Now, I need to get things ready for the next slot. Why don't you go and tell Emelio about the good impression his kebabs made.
textByHash.362ada4f2e7231a34feed151ee23dacc0161c4f6: I don't think you need anything else, do you? Why don't you go and tell Emelio about the good impression his kebabs made.
textByHash.c277ea41596e5283c4a710750515e3b545de1d3d: Not since you killed that one. The beastmaster reckons there was a problem with it imprinting. Happens from time to time.
textByHash.51c24fe886e9bc13ca9a25818f742e3cbb336d74: Yup. They're meant to imprint on the beastmaster as soon as they're born, but this one seemingly didn't. As I say, it sometimes happens.
